urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Victoria announces new social media ‘demasking’ powers for accounts accused of vilification
latest.summary: Victoria is proposing new laws to allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children from online harm by lowering the legal threshold for negligence claims against social media and AI platforms.
latest.details: Victoria is proposing new laws to allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children from online harm by lowering the legal threshold for negligence claims against social media and AI platforms. The proposed changes would eliminate the requirement for families to prove a permanent impairment for minors. Experts believe these reforms are a positive step but should be expanded to cover more online behaviors.
latest.full_brief: Victoria is proposing new laws to allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children from online harm by lowering the legal threshold for negligence claims against social media and AI platforms. The proposed changes would eliminate the requirement for families to prove a permanent impairment for minors. Experts believe these reforms are a positive step but should be expanded to cover more online behaviors.

latest.title: How new bird show hopes to help endangered flyers
latest.summary: Exotic and endangered birds from across the world have found a new home in County Durham as part of a history-inspired theme park. Curators hope they can be used to help save their cousins in the wild.
latest.details: Exotic and endangered birds from across the world have found a new home in County Durham as part of a history-inspired theme park. Curators hope they can be used to help save their cousins in the wild. The Lost Feather is one of five new shows launching at the Kynren site in July, focusing specifically on birds. The show aims to inspire visitors to work in conservation and feel a connection to the birds.
latest.full_brief: Exotic and endangered birds from across the world have found a new home in County Durham as part of a history-inspired theme park. Curators hope they can be used to help save their cousins in the wild. The Lost Feather is one of five new shows launching at the Kynren site in July, focusing specifically on birds. The show aims to inspire visitors to work in conservation and feel a connection to the birds.

latest.title: Russians turn to cash, putting more strain on slowing wartime economy
latest.summary: Russians are increasingly relying on cash as mobile internet shutdowns disrupt card payments. The Central Bank reported a significant rise in cash circulation since the beginning of the year.
latest.details: Russians are increasingly relying on cash as mobile internet shutdowns disrupt card payments. The Central Bank reported a significant rise in cash circulation since the beginning of the year. This trend is attributed to the ongoing war with Ukraine and recent drone attacks. The shift to cash is complicating tax collection for the government amid a growing budget deficit.
latest.full_brief: Russians are increasingly relying on cash as mobile internet shutdowns disrupt card payments. The Central Bank reported a significant rise in cash circulation since the beginning of the year. This trend is attributed to the ongoing war with Ukraine and recent drone attacks. The shift to cash is complicating tax collection for the government amid a growing budget deficit.

latest.title: Why the World Cup half-time show may be a taste of things to come
latest.summary: The World Cup final will feature a half-time show for the first time, with performances from major artists like Madonna and Shakira. This extended break will last up to 25 minutes, exceeding the standard 15-minute stoppage time.
latest.details: The World Cup final will feature a half-time show for the first time, with performances from major artists like Madonna and Shakira. This extended break will last up to 25 minutes, exceeding the standard 15-minute stoppage time. The event is being described as a landmark celebration by FIFA, merging sports and music. There is speculation about whether this trend will continue in future sporting events.
latest.full_brief: The World Cup final will feature a half-time show for the first time, with performances from major artists like Madonna and Shakira. This extended break will last up to 25 minutes, exceeding the standard 15-minute stoppage time. The event is being described as a landmark celebration by FIFA, merging sports and music. There is speculation about whether this trend will continue in future sporting events.

latest.title: The hidden cost of the night shift and how to sleep it off
latest.summary: Night shift workers face significant challenges due to the disruption of their internal biological clocks. This disruption can lead to serious health issues, including heart attacks and mental illness.
latest.details: Night shift workers face significant challenges due to the disruption of their internal biological clocks. This disruption can lead to serious health issues, including heart attacks and mental illness. Recent studies suggest that splitting sleep into two blocks may help mitigate the negative effects of night shifts. Sleep is crucial for memory consolidation and overall health, making the impact of shift work particularly concerning.
latest.full_brief: Night shift workers face significant challenges due to the disruption of their internal biological clocks. This disruption can lead to serious health issues, including heart attacks and mental illness. Recent studies suggest that splitting sleep into two blocks may help mitigate the negative effects of night shifts. Sleep is crucial for memory consolidation and overall health, making the impact of shift work particularly concerning.

latest.title: Private jets flock to Montana - but locals can't afford the trailer park
latest.summary: Bozeman, Montana, has seen a population increase of about 20% since the pandemic, driven by an influx of new residents. This growth has led to a significant rise in housing prices, making it difficult for locals to afford living in the area.
latest.details: Bozeman, Montana, has seen a population increase of about 20% since the pandemic, driven by an influx of new residents. This growth has led to a significant rise in housing prices, making it difficult for locals to afford living in the area. The phenomenon has been partly attributed to the 'Yellowstone Effect,' where the popular TV show has drawn attention to the region. Local leaders are concerned about the socioeconomic divide that is emerging as a result of these changes.
latest.full_brief: Bozeman, Montana, has seen a population increase of about 20% since the pandemic, driven by an influx of new residents. This growth has led to a significant rise in housing prices, making it difficult for locals to afford living in the area. The phenomenon has been partly attributed to the 'Yellowstone Effect,' where the popular TV show has drawn attention to the region. Local leaders are concerned about the socioeconomic divide that is emerging as a result of these changes.

latest.title: Britain 'set for bumper year' for butterflies
latest.summary: A butterfly charity says the UK could be set for a 'bumper' year of the insects as it launches its annual appeal for the public to count them. Butterfly Conservation reported an increase in several species due to a hot and dry spring.
latest.details: A butterfly charity says the UK could be set for a 'bumper' year of the insects as it launches its annual appeal for the public to count them. Butterfly Conservation reported an increase in several species due to a hot and dry spring. The Big Butterfly Count 2026 runs from 17 July to 9 August, encouraging people to log their butterfly sightings. Initiatives like No Mow May are helping to create more habitats for butterflies.
latest.full_brief: A butterfly charity says the UK could be set for a 'bumper' year of the insects as it launches its annual appeal for the public to count them. Butterfly Conservation reported an increase in several species due to a hot and dry spring. The Big Butterfly Count 2026 runs from 17 July to 9 August, encouraging people to log their butterfly sightings. Initiatives like No Mow May are helping to create more habitats for butterflies.

latest.title: Why some women are being driven out of the workplace by an illness
latest.summary: Carla Cressy, diagnosed with endometriosis at 25, retrained as a beauty therapist due to her health issues. One in six women with endometriosis are estimated to leave the workplace because of the condition.
latest.details: Carla Cressy, diagnosed with endometriosis at 25, retrained as a beauty therapist due to her health issues. One in six women with endometriosis are estimated to leave the workplace because of the condition. Carla's untreated endometriosis led to severe complications, including the need for a total hysterectomy. She has since formed a charity to support others affected by the condition.
latest.full_brief: Carla Cressy, diagnosed with endometriosis at 25, retrained as a beauty therapist due to her health issues. One in six women with endometriosis are estimated to leave the workplace because of the condition. Carla's untreated endometriosis led to severe complications, including the need for a total hysterectomy. She has since formed a charity to support others affected by the condition.

latest.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
latest.summary: Dave Eggers spoke to OpenAI staff about the negative impact of ChatGPT on education. He claimed that the tool has made teachers' lives significantly more challenging.
latest.details: Dave Eggers spoke to OpenAI staff about the negative impact of ChatGPT on education. He claimed that the tool has made teachers' lives significantly more challenging. Eggers expressed concern that students using ChatGPT to write would lose their ability to express their own voices. He described this phenomenon as silencing an entire generation or two.
latest.full_brief: Dave Eggers spoke to OpenAI staff about the negative impact of ChatGPT on education. He claimed that the tool has made teachers' lives significantly more challenging. Eggers expressed concern that students using ChatGPT to write would lose their ability to express their own voices. He described this phenomenon as silencing an entire generation or two.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
